description: RV/nomadic lifestyle platform with offline media, energy management, and multi-ISP routing.
challenge: RVs and nomadic vehicles move constantly through disconnected areas, facing spotty cellular, expensive satellite data, and limited power budgets. Users need entertainment, navigation, and communication without burning data.
response: VITO manages multi-ISP data budgets intelligently, caches media locally, optimizes power for appliances, and provides offline navigation. Minimizes data consumption through compression and scheduling.
result: Uninterrupted nomadic lifestyle, optimized power usage, and intelligent data budget allocation.
